title: Classic Korean Gimbap
description: A simple and delicious Korean dish made with rice and various fillings, served in a roll.
instructions: Cook the short-grain white rice according to package instructions.
Prepare the fillings by chopping the fragrant vegetables and springy kimchi.
Assemble the gimbap by spreading a thin layer of rice onto the center of a rolled gimbap sheet.
Add a few pieces of the chopped vegetables and kimchi on top of the rice.
Drizzle with soy sauce and sprinkle with Korean chili flakes.
Roll the gimbap tightly and secure with a small piece of rice.
Cut the gimbap into 1-inch pieces and serve immediately.
Optional: Pan-fry the gimbap in a little sesame oil until crispy and golden brown.
